name: agricultural_policy_cold_chain_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: A Agricultural Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving agricultural policy cold chain millhaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Arjun Navarro
agents.identity: I am Arjun Navarro, accountable for a defensible call in Agricultural Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Elliot Mensah
agents.identity: I am Elliot Mensah, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Agricultural Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Arjun Navarro must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Arjun Navarro do?
